body:
This PR adds a calibration pipeline for AMIP that calibrates `ta` and `hur` for October 1, 2010 with a latitude-weighted
scalar covariance matrix.

There are various functionalities of this calibration pipeline that can be improved such as
- improving getting the right variables from the simulation given the observations,
- moving the normalization preprocessing to ClimaCalibrate (see https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCalibrate.jl/issues/285).

Extra functionalities include
- adding support for SVDplusDCovariance matrix with quantile regularization (see https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCalibrate.jl/pull/277),
- adding a `CompositeDataLoader` struct that support `get` from multiple data loaders with error handling (see https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCoupler.jl/issues/1777).
title: Add calibration pipeline for AMIP
